name: formaldehyde_electrostatics
prompt: Run the electrostatics task on formaldehyde using the PM7 (mopac) method in the gas phase. Report the dipole moment in Debye as the headline value (the electrostatics task also returns a total energy and partial charges — do NOT report those as the headline value), state the method used, and surface any warnings the calculation produced about PM7 parameter coverage. Use charge 0 and multiplicity 1. Use the chemkit tools; do not guess the number.
